summary: Round 1 (combined A+B+C), fully hands-on: Go gates green live (0.11.0==plugin, gofmt/vet/-race clean across 8 packages, incl. all REV-009..012 + badge regression tests re-run by name). UAT state machine dogfooded end-to-end on a fixture (accept path + full issues->lock->analyst->re-accept->rerun path); 25 event lines schema-valid; one-legal-command-per-state holds modulo TEST-004; back-compat ships pre-0.11 done features with the noted clause; a new green feature can never reach status:done (grep-confirmed). ## Custom byte-preserved (diff+md5-identical) through reconcile, --force, and the phase-5 reconcile; gogo-skills budget/candidate exemption confirmed. CLI live-driven in tmux on a private fixture: trash delete/list/restore/collision-refusal, changelog-card bounce, badges (incl. waiting-for-user-wins-over-awaiting-uat), uat.md drill-in, gogo events rendering of uat-opened/uat-passed/uat-failed, peek show/refresh/no-attach/no-session-hint, and the full permission-mode matrix (default/override/empty-omit) all pass, confirmed via both live confirm-dialog text and real recorded claude-stub argv -- but this same live driving surfaced 2 MAJOR CLI bugs neither review nor unit tests caught: TEST-004 (a mid-UAT-rerun feature with a stale report/ misclassifies as ready-to-ship in cli/internal/contract/contract.go's classify(), live-reproduced via the real gogo status binary) and TEST-005 (hasLiveSession/liveSessionFor's naive substring match cross-attributes one feature's live session to an unrelated feature whose slug is a textual substring of it, live-reproduced via a wrong-session peek). Plus a doc-sweep MAJOR (TEST-009: README's Agents section never lists the new gogo-analyst agent) and 4 minor + 3 nit doc/telemetry findings (TEST-001,003,006,007,008,010). Not all-green: routes back to implement with --issues test/issues.json. This round ran under an unusual operational condition -- a concurrent process was independently working the same mandate on the same feature folder in parallel and had already written a first-draft test/issues.json + test-01.md + test/result.json plus 2 events.jsonl lines by the time this pass reached that step; every one of its 8 recorded findings was independently re-derived and re-confirmed from primary sources before being kept (2 of the majors were re-built from scratch on fresh fixtures and re-run against the real binary), 2 more findings were added on top, and one corrective events.jsonl line was appended to give the round a single accurate final tally. Nothing in the final artifacts is taken on trust.
